claims.subject: POS self-service
claims.evidence: if i could click a button and merge pos and pos self-service into one branded family with two configurations, i think we'd close more deals and have fewer support tickets and the sales team would thank me. the engineering side i can manage, the customer comms i can manage, the brand thing is the actual blocker
claims.object_value: brand naming — POS and POS self-service not unified into one branded family

claims.subject: naming blocker conversation
claims.evidence: stuck. i raised it in february, raised it again in march. hannah's open to it but is pulled into other things. rajesh isn't blocking but he isn't agreeing either. we need a thirty minute meeting and a decision.
claims.object_value: stuck; raised in February and March 2026; unresolved
